channel.title: Sam Wiwatanapataphee
channel.description: Course notes and portfolio by Sam Wiwatanapataphee

item.title: R and Python for Computer Simulation
item.description: STAT2005 Computer Simulation course notes, slides, and workshop activities

item.title: YSU Economics
item.description: Economics lecture slides, workshop activities, and assessments (accessible until 30 June 2025).

item.title: Statistical Probability and Data Analysis
item.description: Printable summary sheet for first-year statistical probability and data analysis course.

item.title: Probability Distributions Reference Sheet
item.description: Printable reference sheet for standard discrete and continuous probability distributions. This includes description, mean, variance, PMF/PDF, and CDF function for each distribution.

item.title: Hypothesis Testing Reference Sheet
item.description: Printable reference sheet for hypothesis testing including one-proportion z-test, two-proportion z-test, one-sample t-test, paired t-test, two-sample t-test, F-test, and chi-squared test.

item.title: Calculus Reference Sheet
item.description: Printable reference sheet for foundation mathematics and calculus including trignomometric/hyperbolic functions and identities, complex numbers, derivatives, integrals,limit, series test, polynomial approximation, Taylor series, first and second order differential equations, matrix operations, system of linear equations, lines and planes in space, and vector.
